name: Raspberry Tiramisu
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb White chocolate, cut into pieces and melted
Fresh raspberries and Raspberry sauce (sweetened pureed raspberries), for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine mascarpone, cream cheese, sour cream, whipped cream, and sugar; mix well.
2. Blend half the cheese mixture with white chocolate, set aside.
3. Blend remaining cheese mixture with raspberry puree.
4. Place each chocolate cup on a dessert plate and set aside.
5. Combine espresso, Tia Maria, and Frangelico in a large bowl.
6. Dip ladyfingers into the espresso mixture.
7. Place two ladyfingers on the bottom of each chocolate cup.
8. Spread white chocolate mixture over the ladyfingers.
9. Top with another layer of ladyfingers.
10. Add a layer of raspberry-cheese mixture.
11. Sprinkle raspberries over top.
12. Put raspberry sauce in a squeeze bottle and squirt a decorative design on each plate.
